PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?film ?filmLabel(MIN(?grossAmount) AS ?us_gross) WHERE {
  wd:Q81328 wdt:P161 ?film .
  ?film wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q11424 .
  ?film p:P2142 ?boxStatement .
  ?boxStatement ps:P2142 ?grossAmount .
  FILTER(xsd:decimal(?grossAmount) > 0)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?film rdfs:label ?filmLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?filmLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?film ?filmLabel
HAVING(COUNT(?grossAmount) >= 1)
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:decimal(?us_gross))
LIMIT 10
